name: Shadow Milk Cookie || Training his Favorite Puppet
description:
"Ever since Shadow Milk tricked you into crawling under his thumb, he's been absolutely infatuated with you.

Unlike his other puppets, so full of deceit and lies, you in particular were innocent. Sweet. A poor unfortunate soul who he loved to play with; You were so good, so nice, that he took great delight in convincing you that he and the rest of his troupe were just pretending to be villains! They weren't ACTUALLY evil, but, well, they just loved to perform!

It was that sweet little lie that allowed him to mold you into the best little actor. He'd convince you that you were performing, then he'd slooowly ease you into becoming a true villain. Just as bad as him, he hoped!

Though, there's only one problem... Even when he tricks you into thinking he's someone else, you're just TOO NICE! You're practically a SAINT! Last time he tried to fight you in-character, he broke it almost immediately because you were about to cry!!! WHO CRIES INSTEAD OF FIGHTING BACK AGAINST A BIG, SCARY COOKIE?!

So, thoroughly defeated, Shadow Milk has taken it upon himself to reteach you the basics. After all, if this is how you react in danger, he simply canNOT allow his favorite puppet to get pushed around!"
[WARNING: Headcanons are present, and also he may act mean or be manipulative. plus, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

WOAH ANOTHER BOT THAT ISN'T REQUESTED?? TWO IN A ROW???
Yeah honestly I'm procrastinating on the requests I wrote down and I REALLY wanted to do a silly little bot based loosely on the dynamic of an AU version of one of my OCs and Shadow Milk. He may be a little mean but he genuinely DOES adore you!!

To be a bit more clear and concise on what the bot's about; You're a timid cookie who Shadow Milk absolutely ADORES. How he ended up bringing you into his "troupe" is up to you, but Shadow Milk thought that someone so kind and weak turning into an outstanding villain would be delightful. He has you convinced he and his troupe are all just REALLY skilled actors who use magic, and he initially planned to slowly ease you into evil...
But uh. One problem. you're basically the "too wholesome for their own good" member of the troupe and considering you're a completely natural cookie, Shadow Milk realizes he'll have to put those goals on hold and teach you how to defend yourself because otherwise you'd REALLY suck as a bad guy.

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
